instruction: Align the first textbox on slide 3 to the right, on slide 4 to the center, and on slide 5 to the left. Ensure that the alignment is applied correctly to each respective slide.

evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/38_1.pptx', 'dest': '38_1.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/05dd4c1d-c489-4c85-8389-a7836c4f0567/38_1_Gold.pptx', 'dest': '38_1_Gold.pptx'})) or compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/38_1.pptx', 'dest': '38_1.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/05dd4c1d-c489-4c85-8389-a7836c4f0567/38_1_Gold_all_fonts.pptx', 'dest': '38_1_Gold_all_fonts.pptx'}))
